channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: What's Next: Ranking 7 Veteran NFL QBs Who Should Be Available This Offseason
item.description: With a weak QB draft class, NFL teams will be looking to acquire starting-caliber veterans this offseason. Here are seven to watch.

item.title: 4 Takeaways From Daytona 500 as Tyler Reddick, Michael Jordan Celebrate Huge Win
item.description: Tyler Reddick and Michael Jordan have a lot to celebrate after getting into Victory Lane at the Daytona 500.

item.title: 2025-26 NBA Title Odds: Thunders, Nuggets Hold Steady Exiting All-Star Break
item.description: All-Star Weekend has come and gone. Who is favored entering the home stretch? See the latest odds.

item.title: Growing Up a NASCAR Fan, Michael Jordan Enjoys the Ultimate Victory
item.description: The NBA's GOAT found himself on top of the NASCAR world Sunday at the Daytona 500 thanks to Tyler Reddick's win.

item.title: Men's College Basketball Rankings: Purdue, Texas Tech Make Massive Jumps
item.description: FOX Sports' Casey Jacobsen shares his latest men's college hoops rankings with several big moves this week.

item.title: ð Men's NCAA Tournament Bubble Watch
item.description: Seton Hall is still fourth in a Big East expected to send three teams to the NCAA tournament.

item.title: The top 10 women's college basketball games left in the regular season
item.description: Regular-season titles, conference tournament seeds and NCAA tournament hopes are on the line.

item.title: Answering key offseason questions for every NFL team: Intel on free agency, QB decisions and draft options
item.description: Which teams will make a splash move? Which teams must make adjustments? We answered big offseason questions.

item.title: Grades, lessons learned and big questions from Team USA's 5-1 win over Germany
item.description: An American win seemed inevitable, sending the team through to the quarterfinals. Here's what stood out the most.

item.title: 11 draft prospects with a true first-round grade
item.description: There's a difference between going in Round 1 and being graded in Round 1, so who makes the list?
